calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PAUL PERDUE FOR PLAINTIFF MARILYN WONG
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY SUSAN PETRO FOR DEFENDANT LAURA SERNA

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS:DEFENDANT TO PAY BACKRENT IN THE SUM OF $7700, TO BE PAID AT THE RATE OF $500 PER MONTH ALONG WITH MONTHLY RENT OF $1287 FOR A TOTAL OF $1787 PER MONTH ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH. PLAINTIFF, WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM 6/30/05 WILL REPAIR WALL IN REAR OF BEDROOM CLOSET, 2 WINDOWS IN LIVINGROOM, CLOGGED SINK, AND THERMOSTAT. PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE $500 PAYMENT OF BACKRENT FOR EACH MONTH REPAIRS NOT MADE. DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH A KEY TO PREMISES AND TO COOPERATE WITH PLAINTIFF. IF THERE IS A DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS, PLAINTIFF, WITH 48 HOUR NOTICE, MAY FILE AN EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF 1421 SILLIMAN STREET, UNPAID RENT DUE, ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS, LEASE TO BE FORFEITED, AND WRIT TO ISSUE. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A WRITTEN AGREEMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:WILLIAM RAUCH, JR ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE (218)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar May-11-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LAURA SERNA; DEMURRER
